objectives: Implement full MT<->MX bidirectional translation framework in mx20022-translate crate
All 6 translation directions: MT103<->pacs.008.001.13, MT202<->pacs.009.001.10, MT940<->camt.053.001.11
Pass cargo check, test, clippy -D warnings, and fmt checks
constraints: ChoiceWrapper is a named struct { inner: T }, not a tuple struct — use ::new() for construction, .inner for access
important_facts: ChoiceWrapper<T> has pub inner: T, ::new(val), and Deref to T — NOT tuple struct
camt053 ReportEntry13 builder: required fields are amt, cdt_dbt_ind, sts, bk_tx_cd
camt053 CashBalance8 builder: required fields are tp, amt, cdt_dbt_ind, dt
TranslationWarnings.warnings is Vec<TranslationWarning>, not a slice directly
mx20022_parse exports de::from_str and ser::to_string_with_declaration (not at crate root)
MT :21: in MT202 is the related reference (not transaction reference) - maps to tx_id
pacs009_to_mt202 test was wrong: :21: should be REL-REF-001, not TXN-REF-202-001
decisions_made: Use ChoiceWrapper::new() for all construction, .inner for field access in patterns: consistent with actual struct definition
TranslationResult<T: Debug> has #[derive(Debug)] bound: required by test unwrap_err calls
CLI translate.rs uses mx20022_parse::de::from_str and mx20022_parse::ser::to_string_with_declaration: only exported via module paths
camt053_to_mt940 renames field_28c/field_60f/field_62f to seq_number/opening_balance/closing_balance: fix similar_names clippy lint
pacs008_to_mt103 renames field_32a/field_50k/field_59/field_71a to sttlm_field/ordering_party/beneficiary/charge_bearer: fix similar_names lint

iteration.summary: Completed the MT<->MX translation framework for mx20022-translate crate. Fixed ChoiceWrapper usage throughout (named struct, not tuple). Fixed TranslationResult Debug bound. Added CLI translate subcommand using correct mx20022_parse module paths. Fixed 33 clippy errors including similar_names (variable renames), format!-appended-to-String (write! macro), map.unwrap_or -> map_or, redundant closures, identical match arms, and missing Panics docs. All quality gates pass: cargo check, cargo test (78 unit + 39 integration tests), cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo fmt.
outputs_produced: All 9 mapping modules (6 translation directions + charset + error + helpers)
next_actions: Task #14: Implement scheme-specific validation (FedNow, SEPA, CBPR+)
